sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String, date DateTime, score Float32 NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, NULL, '2023-01-02 00:00:00', NULL);
SELECT ignore(value = 'ClickHouse', score IS NULL) FROM test_table WHERE id = 3;
SELECT ignore((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL), value) FROM test_table WHERE score = ignore(0, 1);
SELECT id, ignore(value, date) FROM test_table WHERE ignore(score IS NOT NULL, value = '') = 0;
SELECT ignore(SUM(score), (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table)) AS max_check FROM test_table HAVING ignore(MAX(value IS NULL), COUNT(*)) > 2;
SELECT t1.id, ignore(t2.value, t2.date) FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table t2 ON ignore(t1.score, t2.score) = 0 WHERE t1.id > 1;
SELECT ignore(AVG(score), MIN(score)) AS average_min FROM (SELECT DISTINCT score FROM test_table WHERE value <> '') GROUP BY value HAVING ignore(MIN(score) = 0, MAX(value IS NULL)) = 0;
